installCommand: curl -fsSL https://storage.googleapis.com/flutter_infra_release/releases/stable/linux/flutter_linux_3.29.2-stable.tar.xz | tar xJ -C /usr/local && export PATH="/usr/local/flutter/bin:$PATH" && flutter config --enable-web
buildCommand: export PATH="/usr/local/flutter/bin:$PATH" && flutter pub get && flutter build web --release
